title: diandranthus brevipilus
intro: Diandranthus brevipilus, commonly known as Chinese angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the Apiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its ability to promote digestive health, alleviate menstrual cramps, and boost the immune system. The therapeutic actions of Chinese angelica include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, which help to soothe the body and relieve respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Diandranthus brevipilus include ferulic acid, phenolic acids, and volatile oils, which contribute to its therapeutic effects and health benefits.
